shots.spoken_during: with a 6 hour flight where Patrick watched anime the whole time and Jerry and I locked in researching We landed checked in and instead of sleeping we biked around Boston till like midnight Then we woke up at 7 got to Harvard sat through a couple talks and then started building something we thought was insane MedSim a 3D trauma centered simulation

shots.spoken_during: One problem we're being judged on our pitch decks and we don't have one So

options.source_type: screen recording of the subject's website
options.rationale: Signals the issue that arises from unpreparedness in a visible form.

options.source_type: screen recording of the subject's website
options.rationale: Shares the anxiety and urgency in bracing for immediate presentation.

options.source_type: screen recording of the subject's website

shots.spoken_during: So we sprint back to Harvard throw together slides on zero sleep and practice in the bathroom until we can say it without thinking We pitch and at that point we're too tired to even care what happened until they start announcing winners

shots.spoken_during: And then they call our name Jerry and I sprint up Patrick already left and somehow we pulled it off Three high schoolers Most of it I think the biggest thing from this weekend is just how much the team matters None of that happens without the random dumb stuff The dance breaks the croissant eating just staying sane while everything is kind of falling apart Why season a week So yeah stay tuned
